ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach managing the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the coach */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the coach */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any coaching certifications held by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the performance */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Total field goals made in the game */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Total free throws made in the game */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots made in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the player's team in the game */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opposing team in the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom the stats are recorded */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "average_ppg" REAL /* Average points per game for the season */,
  "total_fg_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made in the season */,
  "total_fg_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted in the season */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made in the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in the season */,
  "total_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made in the season */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made in the season */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers in the season */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the player's team in the season */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player's team in the league for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
